# gcore_storage_ssh_keys (Data Source)

SSH keys enable secure access to SFTP storage by associating public keys with user accounts for authentication.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "gcore_storage_ssh_keys" "example_storage_ssh_keys" {
  name = "name"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `max_items` (Number) Max items to fetch, default: 1000
- `name` (String) Filter by name (partial match)
- `order_by` (String)

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) The items returned by the data source (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp when the SSH key was created
- `id` (Number) Unique identifier for the SSH key
- `name` (String) User-defined name for the SSH key
- `public_key` (String) The SSH public key content
